markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content feedback and align on new SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Internal linking is a top priority,** requiring a new workflow to ensure links are contextually relevant, target a page's primary keyword, and are used only once per keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
  - [**Content must add "information gain"** over SERP competitors to rank, using unique structures, proprietary data, and case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [**Google is penalizing AI "chunking" patterns** (e.g., one paragraph per H3), causing major ranking drops and requiring a refresh of older articles.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**GrowthX will get access to the "mother doc"** (content inventory) and proprietary stats (ETA Feb) to improve content strategy and linking accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Topics

### Google's AI Content Stance

  - [**Problem:** Google's public stance against AI "chunking" (one paragraph per H3) has caused major ranking drops for Brex pages.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
      - [**Examples:** Corporate card policy page, business credit card rewards page (lost top-10 rankings).](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** Google is now actively penalizing clear AI-generated patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Action:** Jon will personally refresh these high-priority, top-of-funnel articles.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)

### Internal Linking Strategy

  - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX will implement a new process to ensure all internal links meet Brex's standards.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [**Standard:** Links must be contextually relevant and target a page's primary keyword.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)
      - [**Error:** Linking the same keyword to multiple pages (e.g., "corporate credit cards" to three different URLs) is a critical mistake.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Brex's internal data shows a direct correlation between this specific linking strategy and ranking improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Resource:** Jon will provide the "mother doc" (content inventory) to help GrowthX understand the site's content and linking targets.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### Content Structure & "Information Gain"

  - [**Goal:** Add "information gain" over SERP competitors to justify ranking.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
      - [**Unique Structures:** Use structures that are superior to top-ranking articles (e.g., NerdWallet's vs. article format).](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [**Proprietary Data:** Incorporate unique stats from Brex's data science team (ETA Feb).](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [**Case Studies:** Include mentions of Brex case studies where relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
      - [**Unique Headers:** Create original, non-generic headers to stand out.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [**Constraint:** Be cautious with competitor comparisons (e.g., Mercury) due to past legal threats.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jon:**](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to the "mother doc" (content inventory).](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Provide the document with proprietary statistics (ETA Feb).](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1239.0)
      - [Fix meta descriptions to 150–160 characters.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [Expand intros to three flowing paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
      - [Implement the new internal linking workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
      - [Adopt "information gain" tactics (unique structures, case studies).](https://fathom.video/share/d-YvzBRxxwa7FjFi3zb3cd8Lv5RqPrwt?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
